title: Kuma Strikes Saturn
description: On pages 10–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Sanji, Nusjuro, Marines, Bonney, Saturn as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm coming, Bonney- Chan!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Kizaru! That bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Nusjuro
dialogue.text: PACIFISTA UNITS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How suitably ironic!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: ..FIRE YOUR LASERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kill Bonney and Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You threw away your life so that your daughter could live...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now her life will be taken by your clones!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Daddy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bonney... When I heard you had become a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't help but dwell on the worst-case scenario...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Pacificista won't hesitate to shoot you if, the Navy commanded... they may look just like your father...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they don't know or care that you are the daughter of their progenitor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Grab!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: A fitting fate for a squirming insect!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your struggle was truly the height of folly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey!! Isn't this straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WE FALLED TO NEUTRALIZE THAT ESCAPING VESEL...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAWE HAVE TO REPORT THIS... TO KIZARU- SAN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'M SO STuffED. I CAN BARELY MOVE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HE HAS TO KNOW, THAT THEY'RE HEADING FOR EGGHEAD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Seize him, quick!! He's an Emperor!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
